topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: On first start, if database flow_finance_ai does not exist on the configured external Postgres, Flow Finance AI creates it automatically then runs migrations—no manual CREATE DATABASE step.

backend/src/db startup path before SQLx migrations; optional DATABASE_BOOTSTRAP_* env for admin connection to maintenance DB postgres; docker-compose docs and .env.example; runbook US-0010 omniflow section.

Shared host postgres may deny CREATEDB for app user—need optional admin URL or bootstrap role; TimescaleDB server packages still operator responsibility; idempotent re-start; must not drop existing DB; US-0010 external-only posture unchanged.

Integration test or script: empty postgres → first start creates DB and migrations succeed; existing DB unchanged; fail-closed log when bootstrap lacks privilege; document when manual bootstrap still required for TimescaleDB server install.
Operator on omniflow can fix missing-DB startup with only .env credentials; runbook manual SQL optional for TimescaleDB host install only; acceptance checklist in docs/product/acceptance.md.
